creator: scott@sabami.seaslug.org
text:
zsh-2.6b8 package doesn't add entry to /etc/shells. It should in order
	for users to be able to specify it as a login shell (probably among
	other consequences).

Fix: 

"Manually" edit /etc/shells.
How-To-Repeat: 
	1) make sure zsh isn't in your /etc/shells.
	2) do a 'pkg_add zsh-2.6b8.tgz'
	3) check /etc/shells and notice that zsh is not in there.
